title: Incident Report: Lab Result Delay
key_points:
Incident Report: Lab Result Delay

Date: 2026-07-18
Owner: Operations Team
Priority: High

Several patients complained that their lab results were not visible after sample collection.
The issue occurred because results were marked as pending even after technician completion.
The clinical review step was not clearly explained to patients.
risks: Hospitals may lose confidence in the digital record system.
action_items: Add an explanation for pending, reviewed, and completed results.
Train support staff to explain the result workflow.

title: Patient Access Policy
key_points:
Patient Access Policy
Date: 2026-07-21
Owner: Compliance Team
Priority: Medium
Patients may request copies of visit summaries, prescriptions, and laboratory reports.
Staff must verify the patient's identity before releasing medical records.
Access requests should be completed within the hospital's approved timeline.

Risks:
- Identity verification failures may expose private records.
risks: Identity verification failures may expose private records.
Delayed responses may create patient complaints.
action_items: Escalate delayed access requests to compliance staff.

title: Vendor Contract Review Notes
key_points:
Vendor Contract Review Notes

Date: 2026-07-20
Vendor: BrightPath Diagnostics
Contract Value: $24,000
Renewal Date: 2026-12-31

The vendor will provide laboratory integration support and monthly maintenance.
The contract requires a 30-day notice before termination.
The vendor must respond to high-priority incidents within 4 hours.

Risks:
- The service-level agreement does not define penalties for late responses.
risks: The service-level agreement does not define penalties for late responses.
Security review is required before production access.
action_items: Complete a security review before deployment.
